name: CV & Application Support
description: Transform your CV from overlooked to unforgettable. We craft compelling applications that pass ATS screening and captivate recruiters.
fullDescription: Professional crafting of CVs and cover letters designed to stand out in the competitive job market and get noticed by hiring managers.

name: Interview Coaching
description: Master every interview scenario with intensive one-on-one coaching. From behavioral questions to technical assessments.
fullDescription: Mock interviews and confidence-building techniques to help you secure the role you want.

name: Skills Workshops
description: Accelerate your professional growth through dynamic, interactive training delivered by industry experts.
fullDescription: Interactive group sessions focusing on soft skills, leadership, communication, and workplace etiquette.

name: Corporate Consultancy
description: Partner with us to optimize talent acquisition, strengthen employee retention, and build high-performing teams.
fullDescription: Helping businesses streamline their recruitment processes, employee retention strategies, and organizational development.
